runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "Go", "build_system": "go", "package_manager": "go mod", "build_commands": ["go mod download", "CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o investool"], "install_commands": ["apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "1.20", "system_packages": []}, "repo_type": "cli_tool", "base_image": "alpine:3.23.3", "base_image_rationale": "Minimal runtime image to host the compiled Go binary and configuration with low footprint.", "pitfalls": ["The repo's original Dockerfile uses a tarball (dist/investool.tar.gz) for runtime artifacts. Ensure the build outputs investool and config.toml are packaged appropriately in the final image.", "Go toolchain version in build is not exactly 1.20; the closest official build image available is golang:1.25.8-bookworm (used in a multi-stage plan). Verify compatibility with go.mod go 1.20.", "If the compiled binary is not fully static, it may depend on musl/gotchas in Alpine; CGO must be disabled and proper static linking must be ensured.", "Config.toml must be present and copied into the image at /srv/config.toml to satisfy -c ./config.toml invocation."], "notes": "Proposed Dockerfile uses a two-stage build: builder uses golang:1.25.8-bookworm to compile a binary named investool, runtime uses alpine:3.23.3 to keep the image small. The final image places the binary at /srv/investool and copies config.toml to /srv/config.toml, with entrypoint \"/srv/investool -c /srv/config.toml\". This aligns with the project\u2019s GitHub workflow that builds with CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux and outputs a binary suitable for a small runtime container."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
FROM golang:1.25.8-bookworm AS builder

WORKDIR /build

# Cache Go module downloads
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

# Copy source and build
COPY . .

# Build static binary suitable for Linux
ENV CGO_ENABLED=0
ENV GOOS=linux
ENV GOARCH=amd64
RUN go build -o investool

# Runtime image
FROM alpine:3.23.3

WORKDIR /srv

# Install runtime certificates
RUN apk add --no-cache ca-certificates

# Copy built binary and config into the runtime image
COPY --from=builder /build/investool /srv/investool
COPY config.toml /srv/config.toml

EXPOSE 4869 4870
ENTRYPOINT ["./investool", "-c", "/srv/config.toml"]

artifacts.content:
FROM golang:1.25.8-bookworm AS builder

WORKDIR /build

# Cache Go module downloads
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

# Copy source and build
COPY . .

# Build static binary suitable for Linux
ENV CGO_ENABLED=0
ENV GOOS=linux
ENV GOARCH=amd64
RUN go build -o investool

# Runtime image
FROM alpine:3.23.3

WORKDIR /srv

# Install runtime certificates
RUN apk add --no-cache ca-certificates

# Copy built binary and config into the runtime image
COPY --from=builder /build/investool /srv/investool
COPY config.toml /srv/config.toml

EXPOSE 4869 4870
ENTRYPOINT ["./investool", "-c", "/srv/config.toml"]
